focus: Q3 capability-gap: REAL-GAP semantic code search lost (intentional), COVERED MMR+rescue replaces cross-encoder, 7 new stranded promises (P1 OpenCode memory/search.md cross-encoder docs, P2 code-graph routing/types/comments/validate-doc-refs, INFO registry stale mapping). Zero live cocoindex call sites.

title: OpenCode /memory:search command prompt describes cross-encoder as active (4 locations)
evidence: Lines 120 (cross-encoder reranking runs at Stage 3), 121 (getRerankerStatus exposes cache stats), 872 (getRerankerStatus in telemetry), 986 (rerank parameter enables cross-encoder). All false — rerank now controls MMR diversity.
classification: LIVE-STRANDED. Sister finding to iter-1 F1 (tool-schemas.ts) and iter-2 F9 (gemini search.toml). Missed in prior sweeps.

title: system-code-graph SKILL.md routing advice is self-contradictory
evidence: Under 'When NOT to use': 'Semantic concept search without known structure: use system-code-graph.' Self-contradiction — system-code-graph is structural only (tree-sitter), not semantic.
classification: STRANDED-PROMISE. Implies system-code-graph can do semantic concept search when it cannot.

title: scoringMethod type union still includes cross-encoder variant
evidence: MemoryResultScores.scoringMethod includes 'cross-encoder' with JSDoc 'reranker model relevance'. Never assigned in current pipeline.
classification: STRANDED-PROMISE. Type system accepts a removed variant.

title: shared/embeddings.ts comment references deleted cross-encoder.ts file
evidence: Comment: 'Mirrors the cross-encoder circuit breaker pattern (cross-encoder.ts).' File was deleted in phase 003.

title: sk-doc validate-doc-model-refs.js still validates cross-encoder model paths
evidence: Line 144: 'cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2' in model list. Line 160: 'cross-encoder/' path prefix. Validator accepts stale model references.
classification: STRANDED-PROMISE. Validation infra not cleaned — silently accepts cross-encoder refs in docs.

title: sk-code code organization reference shows deleted cross-encoder.ts
evidence: Line 492 shows 'cross-encoder.ts # Re-ranking' in directory tree. File deleted in phase 003.
classification: STRANDED-PROMISE. Doc shows deleted file in code structure.

title: shared/embeddings/registry.ts maps local cross-encoder model with removal context
evidence: Lines 223-228 document the removal but line 236 still maps local: 'cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2'. Comment provides full context.
classification: Partially STRANDED. Mapping is dead but removal well-documented in comment.

title: Semantic code search via embeddings is genuinely lost
evidence: AGENTS.md routes concept/intent to code-graph+Grep (iterative lexical). system-code-graph is structural only. Old CocoIndex accepted natural-language queries for concept discovery; replacement requires guessing domain terms.
classification: REAL-GAP. Accepted as part of HYBRID deprecation decision (D2). Not a regression — intentional trade-off.

title: MMR + rescue-layer adequately replaces cross-encoder for default path
evidence: Cross-encoder was opt-in. MMR is default-on diversity reranking (SPECKIT_MMR). ADR-011 rescue layer provides measured +1 quality improvement. Benchmarks show 9/10 quality maintained. system-spec-kit SKILL.md and embedder_architecture.md correctly document removal.
classification: COVERED. Default path quality preserved. Opt-in cross-encoder feature lost but was optional.

evidence: Zero hits — deprecation removal complete across all live code, agents, commands, skills, and scripts.
All use correct HYBRID policy: code-graph structural + Grep for concept discovery. No false promises of semantic/embedding code search.
Both accurately document the cross-encoder deprecation with historical context.
